name: Switch
description: An input control that toggles between two mutually exclusive states (on and off), distinct from checkboxes in supporting only binary input with no indeterminate state.

roles.description: Identifies the element as a switch

required_attributes.description: true when ON; false when OFF
Via aria-labelledby, aria-label, or text content

notes: Switches are for immediate effect (like toggling a setting); use checkboxes for form submissions
The visual state should clearly indicate on/off
